generated_exposure.exposure_text: Remember when we relied on allies to handle crises? The 2020 Baltic incident showed what happens when we're not prepared. Our allies hesitated while we scrambled. We can't afford that again. Strengthening our alliances means ensuring they'll stand with us when it counts. Let's make sure America's security isn't left to chance - we owe it to our families and communities to demand reliable partners. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
